name: Cable Rope Crunch
form_cues: Kneel facing the cable stack; pull rope to forehead
Contract abs to crunch down — don't pull with arms
Hips stay anchored; movement comes from spinal flexion
notes: Kneeling cable rope crunch — flexes the spine against resistance.
video_id_query: Cable Rope Crunch kneeling how to proper form
instructions: Attach a rope to the high pulley of a cable machine. Grab the rope with both hands and kneel facing the stack.
Hold the rope at your forehead with elbows tucked.
Crunch down by flexing your spine — pull your sternum toward your pelvis. The arms stay locked; movement comes from the abs.
Slowly extend back up under control. Don't let the stack pull you upright.
